description: La Línea is the main faction of the Juárez Cartel, originally formed as an enforcement unit composed of former police and military personnel. Based in Ciudad Juárez, Mexico, it was founded in 2008 by Juan Pablo Ledezma. The group is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and kidnappings, and has been responsible for numerous massacres in Ciudad Juárez. It has formed alliances with the CJNG and Los Chapitos to combat the Sinaloa Cartel.

country_links.evidence_quote: uno de los cruces más importantes para el tráfico de droga hacia los Estados Unidos
country_links.context: La Línea routes drugs into the United States through the El Paso–Juárez border crossing.
